overall.description: Gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a student character wearing a Gryffindor jacket exploring the interior of Hogwarts castle. The character walks through the Great Hall, corridors with suits of armor, the grand staircase with moving stairs, portrait-lined staircases, and long gothic hallways. The environment features medieval stone architecture, floating candles, torch lighting, and magical moving portraits.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with floating candles and dining tables

events.description: character opens large wooden doors to exit the great hall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the great hall toward the exit doors, wearing a Gryffindor jacket

entered.detail: dozens of candles floating in mid-air providing warm illumination
wooden house tables lined up along the hall
tall carved wooden doors at the far end of the hall
gothic stone arches along the side walls

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the vast Great Hall of Hogwarts, passing under floating candles and alongside long dining tables. The hall is sparsely populated with students sitting at tables. The character approaches and opens the large wooden doors at the far end to exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: castle corridor with suits of armor

events.description: exits the great hall into a narrow torch-lit corridor
lighting shifts from bright hall to dimmer torch-lit corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor, passing suits of armor standing against the stone walls

notable_agents.action: suit of armor standing stationary against the wall

entered.detail: medieval suits of armor lined up against the corridor walls
thick stone support columns along the corridor
wall-mounted torches providing warm flickering light

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, enclosed corridor lined with stone columns and suits of armor. The lighting shifts to artificial torchlight as the character walks past the stationary armor suits toward the next area.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand staircase hall with moving magical staircases

events.description: enters the grand staircase hall with high ceilings and house banners
character looks up to view the moving staircases above

agents.ego_description: climbing the grand staircase while looking up at the shifting magical staircases above

notable_agents.action: another student ascending the stairs ahead of the character

entered.detail: large hanging banners representing Hogwarts houses including Gryffindor
tall arched stained glass windows letting in natural light
wide stone staircase with ornate railings
magical staircases that shift and move between levels
ornate stone railings along the staircase edges
tall bronze statue of a wizard on a pedestal

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast hall with high ceilings, house banners, and tall stained glass windows. The character ascends the grand staircase, passing a large wizard statue, and looks up at the famous moving staircases that shift between the upper levels of the castle.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral staircase lined with moving portraits

events.description: enters narrower staircase lined with framed portraits on the walls
passing moving portraits that animate as the character walks by

agents.ego_description: walking up the stone stairs alongside walls covered with magical portraits

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking up the stairs ahead

entered.detail: numerous framed paintings of wizards covering the stone walls
ornate wall-mounted lamps between the portraits

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrower, enclosed staircase where the walls are densely covered with magical framed portraits. The character continues ascending, following another student up the stone steps while passing the animated paintings.

scene_state.functional_zone: long corridor with gothic arches and benches

events.description: exits staircase into a long straight corridor with windows
passing students sitting on benches along the corridor wall

agents.ego_description: walking down the long corridor past other students relaxing on benches

notable_agents.action: two students sitting on a stone bench by the window conversing

entered.detail: tall pointed gothic arches forming the corridor ceiling
lanterns suspended from the ceiling along the corridor
stone seating along the right wall beneath the windows
tall rectangular windows letting in daylight

segments.scene_description: The character exits the portrait staircase into a long, straight corridor with gothic arches and tall windows. The character walks past students sitting on stone benches along the wall, moving deeper into the castle under hanging lanterns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the expansive, candlelit Great Hall through a series of increasingly intimate and magical castle interiors. It begins by moving past long dining tables under a canopy of floating candles before the character opens large wooden doors to exit the hall. As the camera enters a narrow corridor, the open space gives way to enclosed stone walls lined with suits of armor and flickering torchlight, which then opens up into a vast hall featuring house banners and shifting staircases. The scene shifts again as the character ascends a tighter staircase densely packed with animated portraits, following another student upward. Finally, the path leads out of the portrait gallery and into a long, straight gothic corridor where the camera glides past students on stone benches under the glow of hanging lanterns.
